name: Apple and Cream Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Mix yeast, salt, 4 tbsp sugar, and 3/4 cup flour. Add butter to milk until well combined. Beat in warm milk mixture gradually. Stir until a soft dough forms. Knead for 5-10 minutes. Place in greased bowl and let rise for 1 hour or until doubled. Press into a greased 10-inch springform pan, ensuring the dough rises 1 1/2 inches above the sides.
FILLING: Toss apples with lemon juice, cinnamon, 1/4 cup sugar, and 2 tablespoons flour. Arrange in rows on top of the dough. Beat together cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, and egg. Spread over apples. Let rise for 1 hour in a warm place. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Best when served warm.
